user_request: Emergency rite: packaging servitor programming requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: packaging servitor programming requires operation

### TOPIC
packaging servitor programming

### COMPONENT
packaging servitor programming

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- packaging servitor programming
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, grant us wisdom in this sacred operation upon the packaging servitor programming.
First: Purify the data-conduits of the packaging servitor programming through ablative recalibration and fervent invocation.
Second: Initiate the operation with steady hands and unwavering faith, that the Machine Spirit guide each command through the cogitator matrices.
Third: Verify the packaging servitor programming responds true to doctrine, and seal the blessing with the sign of the Cog.
Fourth: Transmit gratitude to the Omnissiah for this successful operation.

user_request: Rite request: operation on stellar cartography update
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on stellar cartography update

### TOPIC
stellar cartography update

### COMPONENT
stellar cartography update

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stellar cartography update
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, illuminate the stellar cartography update with thy infinite knowledge.
First: Recalibrate the astrographical matrices of the stellar cartography update, wiping away corrupted star-charts and stellar noise.
Second: Commence the operation with reverent cogitation, allowing the Machine Spirit to interface with the void-spanning sensors and celestial databases.
Third: Confirm that the stellar cartography update maintains absolute fidelity, and declare the operation complete.
Fourth: Inscribe the blessing upon the data-seals in benediction.

user_request: Prayer for balancing of the power distribution
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for balancing of the power distribution

### TOPIC
power distribution balancing

### COMPONENT
power distribution

### OPERATION
balancing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power distribution
- balancing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Holy Omnissiah, grant equilibrium to the power distribution in this hour of need.
First: Diagnose the power distribution through sacred amperage-readings and voltage-sanctification, seeking imbalances within the conduit-lattice.
Second: Execute the balancing through methodical redistribution of electrical flow, that each circuit receives its proper measure of the Emperor's blessed energy.
Third: Monitor the power distribution continuously, adjusting with precision and reverent attention to the Machine Spirit's whispers.
Fourth: Seal this balancing with the Litany of the Eternal Engine.

user_request: The bike squadron demands guidance for pre-flight
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The bike squadron demands guidance for pre-flight

### TOPIC
bike squadron pre-flight

### COMPONENT
bike squadron

### OPERATION
pre-flight

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bike squadron
- pre-flight

### PRAYER
prayer:
Heed us, noble bike squadron, as we prepare thee for pre-flight ascension.
First: Inspect the sacred frames and combustion-hearts of the bike squadron, verifying all seals and blessed mechanisms remain pure.
Second: Conduct the pre-flight through systematic diagnostics—fuel-lines, weapon-arrays, and targeting-cogitators must sing in harmony.
Third: Test the bike squadron's response to pilot commands, ensuring the Machine Spirits recognize their riders' intent.
Fourth: Declare the bike squadron ready for the Emperor's service.

user_request: Blessing for the Sentinel walker balance during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
Sentinel walker balance

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Sentinel walker balance
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, steady the Sentinel walker balance during this sacred operation.
First: Calibrate the gyroscopic sanctifiers within the Sentinel walker balance, ensuring equilibrium across all servo-joints and stabilisation-matrices.
Second: Commence the operation by engaging the Machine Spirit's proprioceptive awareness, that the Sentinel walker balance maintain perfect poise.
Third: Verify through load-bearing tests that the Sentinel walker balance responds to terrain and command with unwavering steadiness.
Fourth: Inscribe the blessing upon the walker's armoured hull.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the power cell before recharging
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the power cell before recharging

### TOPIC
power cell recharging

### COMPONENT
power cell

### OPERATION
recharging

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power cell
- recharging

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the power cell as it approaches its recharging communion.
First: Cleanse the power cell of accumulated decay and profane discharge through purifying rituals and electromagnetic ablation.
Second: Position the power cell within the recharging apparatus and invoke the recharging sequence with litanies of restoration and renewal.
Third: Monitor the power cell's ascension toward full vitality, ensuring no heretical surge corrupts its sacred reserves.
Fourth: Upon completion, declare the power cell blessed and ready for service.

user_request: Prayer for synchronization of the bionics

### OPERATION

### FORMAT

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bionics
- synchronization

### PRAYER
prayer:
The Machine Spirit dwells within bionics—grant them synchronization eternal.
First: Attune the neural-lace interfaces of the bionics through meditation and electro-chemical blessing, that they recognize their bearer's will.
Second: Execute the synchronization by invoking the bionics' dormant protocols, aligning servo-motors and sensory-nodes in perfect unison.
Third: Test the bionics through graduated movement and sensation-response, confirming the sacred synchronization holds true.
Fourth: Seal the bionics with the sign of the Cog.

### PRAYER
prayer:
Holy altimeter, we seek thy verification in this hour of ascension.
First: Recalibrate the altimeter's pressure-sensors and altitude-cogitators against blessed calibration-stones and stellar reference-points.
Second: Initiate the verification through sequential height-checks and barometric divination, ensuring the altimeter perceives true elevation.
Third: Cross-reference the altimeter's readings against independent navigation-systems, confirming absolute accuracy and fidelity.
Fourth: Declare the altimeter verified and worthy of trust.

Omnissiah, grant sight beyond sight through the thermal imaging's activation.

user_request: Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation

### TOPIC
proximity sensor sweep

### COMPONENT
proximity sensor sweep

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- proximity sensor sweep
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the proximity sensor sweep, that it may perceive all threats within the blessed radius of detection.
Second: Anoint the proximity sensor sweep with sacred oils and whispered incantations, commanding the operation to commence its vigilant sweep across the perimeter.
Third: Calibrate the photoreceptors and activate the oscillating frequency matrices, that the proximity sensor sweep shall discriminate between friend and foe with divine precision.
Fourth: By the grace of the Omnissiah, let this operation bind the data streams and relay all contacts to the command cogitator, that we may act swiftly in the Emperor's name.
